description_long: This object is a classic lever-action shotgun with a long, blued steel barrel and a polished wooden stock. The receiver and lever mechanism are made of dark metal, contrasting with the rich brown wood of the buttstock and fore-end. The barrel is slender and features a simple, unvented rib along its length, with no visible sights or attachments. The stock is full-sized, ergonomically shaped, and finished with a reddish-brown hue, while the buttplate appears to be reinforced. The lever loop is prominent beneath the receiver, indicating the action type. The overall design is traditional, evoking a robust and reliable firearm suitable for hunting or sport shooting.
description: A traditional lever-action shotgun with a long blued barrel and polished wooden stock, featuring a prominent lever and classic design.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing the narrow, circular barrel profile and a hint of the wooden fore-end below.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, metal receiver, and long barrel with the lever clearly visible.
description_view_2: The shotgun is viewed from the butt end, showing the rounded stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with the lever, trigger guard, and the full wooden stock and barrel visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth contours and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
